title: Filter runs from remarks
description: Update preview/run filtering so explicit remarks MISS/MISMATCH controls eligibility and sync-status/check-adtrans does not hide rows that must be input.
convergence: User sample KOREKSI PANEN sync:MISS match:MISMATCH is included as pending input.
Rows with sync:SYNC match:MATCH are excluded from run payload.
Rows with sync:DIFF or match:MISMATCH are included when mismatch/missing filter is active.
Premium retry-safe logic no longer skips explicit remarks mismatch rows.
